Hi Danilo. Are you attending the data review on Tuesday?
Yes. And on Monday I am meeting two clients. I am arranging it now.
Nice. On Wednesday I am hosting a workshop. I am inviting you.
Thank you. What time? I want to confirm my diary.
At 2 PM. And we are presenting the results on Friday at 3 PM.
Friday is hard for me. Can we postpone it to Monday?
Sure. Let us not cancel it. Do you have a free slot on Monday?
Yes, I have a slot at 11 AM. I am not working in the afternoon.
Perfect. So we are presenting on Monday at 11. I am confirming it now.
Great. Everything is in the diary. Thank you, Rachel.
Are you attending the review at 10 AM?
I am hosting a workshop on Wednesday.
Can we postpone the call to Monday?

Hi, I am Rachel. Let me tell you about my week. It is all in my diary. On Monday, I am meeting the client at 10 AM. On Tuesday, I am attending the data review with the team. On Wednesday, I am hosting a small workshop for two new analysts. On Thursday, we are presenting the results to my manager at 3 PM. I am not working on Friday, because I am taking one day off. I have one free slot on Wednesday afternoon, so I can confirm a quick call with you. It is a full week, but everything is arranged.

Hello, this is Danilo. Let me give you my plans for this week, straight from my calendar. On Monday morning, I am meeting two clients to talk about the new pipeline. On Tuesday, I am running a demo for the team at 2 PM. On Wednesday, I am attending a budget meeting, and I am inviting Rachel to join. On Thursday, I am hosting a call with our partners in the United States. I am not presenting on Friday, because we are postponing that to next week. I have one open slot on Thursday, so let us confirm our one to one then. Everything is in the diary.
